courtlistener.description: CourtListener — Free Law Project. U.S. court opinions and PACER dockets. Citation verification for U.S. case law.
courtlistener.fallback: All citations tagged [VERIFY] — student confirms against primary source

descrybe.description: Descrybe — Primary-law search, citation lookup, quoted-language verification.
descrybe.fallback: All citations tagged [VERIFY] — student confirms against primary source

clio.description: Clio — Case management. Optional future integration. 120+ law schools use Clio. Starting with file upload; connector would let /client-intake and /status pull case data directly.
clio.note: Not bundled. Requires Clio MCP server in environment.

google-drive.description: Google Drive — Search, read, and fetch clinic documents.

slack.description: Slack — Search messages, read channels, find discussions.

note: Run /legal-clinic:integrations to see which servers are available in your environment. Without research tools, all citations are tagged [VERIFY]. Plugin functions either way.
